title: satureja alpina var. suaveolens
intro: Satureja alpina var. suaveolens, also known as the Alpine Summer Savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, its medicinal properties include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of Satureja alpina var. suaveolens include relief from digestive problems, such as bloating and indigestion, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption, and it can also be used in cooking as a culinary herb.
